message:
fix: guard registerCompletedHandle, clear resets running state

Round 11 review fixes:

1. registerCompletedHandle skips if the handle already exists in the
   map, preventing re-registration from overwriting a live re-spawned
   handle with stale completed data.

2. /clear now sets this.running = false and this.agent = null so the
   next submitGoal starts a fresh agent instead of steering the dying
   one from the aborted session.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
